title: Projectzstd
body:
Project ZSTD is a Minecraft mod that introduces two new ores: Citrofite Ore and Netherite Ore, along with powerful new tools and armor.
![Mod items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29afd1578143af186b1ee47d8c30aa7731b89e18.png)
![Mod items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a42d7544a45481f88424290874762ba196d107a6.png)
 Features:
 
Scythes: A new weapon type designed to strike multiple enemies at once, dealing damage in a wide area.
![scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf74137d74eecc0c67bce5f444f5bf9aaa2d5f5e_0.webp)
Citrofite Ore: A new ore that generates underground. It can be smelted into Pure Citrofite, which is used to craft Citrofite Ingots. These ingots are used to create tools and armor that are stronger than Netherite.
![Citrofite Charge craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bb08432446612905ec55c30b099c8989df4e565_0.webp)
![Citrofite Ingoot craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72599dfc4b42dcd60fb1aec7f50471690813307a_0.webp)

 Netherite Ore: A new ore that generates in the Overworld. When mined, it drops Netherite Nuggets, which can be crafted into Netherite Scrap.
![Netherite Scrap craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4196498c52f0059c2d974ccb7f40cedd9f275970_0.webp)

 Citrofite Tools and Armor: A new tier of tools and armor made from Citrofite Ingots, offering superior durability and efficiency compared to Netherite.
![Citrofite Sword craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a38abc8ef93a236cd87f8b881bdbda63897f443_0.webp)

 Project ZSTD adds new resources and equipment to enhance your Minecraft experience, providing a stronger alternative to Netherite.
